items.briefing:
Australian authorities have issued a warning about an ongoing global campaign targeting websites running vulnerable content management systems (CMS) like WordPress and similar platforms. Organisations using these tools should ensure they are fully updated. Separately, a new Android malware called RedHook can silently gain control of devices using a built-in wireless debugging feature, posing a risk if staff use Android phones for work purposes.

IT teams should also be aware of a serious security flaw in Progress ShareFile servers, with the vendor urging administrators to shut down exposed systems immediately. **Practical tip:** Check with your IT team that any websites or file-sharing tools your organisation uses are running the latest software updates.

featured.title: Australia warns of global campaign targeting vulnerable CMS platforms - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: Australian government warns of targeted attacks on vulnerable CMS platforms used by many local businesses.
